title: Select Teams from WorkForms

posts.author: Benjamin (Benjamin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

i´d like to seclect teams from the people questions in WorkForms. This is currently not possible. However, they can be selectet from the people column on the board itself.

This is a bit frustrating because it narrows the usecase of the people question.

Are there any plans to implement this. If not I think this is a good addition to the WorkForms.
